title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Footprint - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Footprint - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
